block.bee_queen_ds.bee_nest_hole_empty.d: §7■ §fThe Queen Bee§r§7 can use this as a door.
block.bee_queen_ds.drone_bee.description: §7■ Feed them nectar to §fcall back§r§7 the bees that have flown far away.
item.bee_queen_ds.beeswax.description_0: §7■ §fThe Queen Bee§r§7 creates this after pollinating crops.
item.bee_queen_ds.caramel_boots.descript: §7■ The full set protects the  §fQueen Bee§r§7 from water, but quickly loses its durability. Tamed bees can also wear this armor and gain §fStrengh§r§7.
item.bee_queen_ds.caramel_chestplate.des: §7■ The full set protects the  §fQueen Bee§r§7 from water, but quickly loses its durability. Tamed bees can also wear this armor and gain §fResistance§r§7.
item.bee_queen_ds.caramel_helmet.descrip: §7■ The full set protects the  §fQueen Bee§r§7 from water, but quickly loses its durability. Tamed bees can also wear this armor and gain §fFire Protection§r§7.
item.bee_queen_ds.caramel_leggings.descr: §7■ The full set protects the  §fQueen Bee§r§7 from water, but quickly loses its durability. Tamed bees can also wear this armor and gain §fHealth Boots§r§7.
item.bee_queen_ds.caramel_partisane.desc: §7■ It has a larger §fattack radius§r§7 and can be eaten by the Queen Bee like candy. Slows enemies with a chance.
item.bee_queen_ds.caramelized_nectar.des: §7■ This is used to create §fCaramel Armor§r§7.
item.bee_queen_ds.flower_nectar.descript: §7■ §fThe Queen Bee§r§7 collects this from flowers.
item.bee_queen_ds.queen_pheromones.descr: §7■ Can be used for §ftame bees§r§7. Tamed bees can be decorated with §fflowers§r§7 and dressed in §fcaramel armor§r§7.
item.bee_queen_ds.royal_honey.descriptio: §7■ §fThe Queen Bee§r§7 uses this to restore mana.
